prompt: Build a CRM with login, contacts, dashboard, role-based access, and premium plan with payments. Admins can see analytics.
Create an e-commerce store selling digital assets. Users can browse products, add to cart, and checkout via Stripe. Needs an admin panel to manage inventory.
Build a project management tool like Trello. Workspaces contain Boards, which contain Lists, which contain Cards. Users can drag and drop cards. Include user roles.
I need a healthcare patient portal. Doctors can upload lab results, and patients can log in to view them. Include a secure messaging system between doctors and patients.
Create a real estate listing platform. Agents can post properties with images, price, and location. Users can search and filter properties and contact agents.
Build a restaurant reservation system. Customers can pick a date, time, and party size. Restaurant managers can see upcoming bookings and block off tables.
Develop a learning management system (LMS). Teachers upload courses and video lessons. Students enroll, track progress, and take quizzes.
Build a simple social network for dog owners. Users create profiles for their dogs, post photos, and follow other dogs. Include a feed of recent posts.
I need an inventory tracking app for a warehouse. Workers can scan barcodes to increment or decrement stock levels. Managers get alerts when stock is low.
Create a SaaS for podcast hosting. Users can upload audio files, add show notes, and generate an RSS feed. Premium users get advanced analytics on listeners.
Make an app that does things with data.
Build a completely anonymous chat app where users don't need accounts, but admins need to be able to ban users based on their account ID and email address.
Dashboard.
I want an app like Uber but for dog walking.
A totally free open-source app that charges users $10/month to log in.
Store for selling shoes.
Need something to manage my life and habits and money and friends.
An offline-only web app that syncs data across multiple devices instantly.
A login page.
Make the ultimate AI application that does everything automatically.
